# init(compressedContentsOfDirectoryAtURL:)

**Initializer**

Creates an attachment containing a zipped archive of an existing directory on disk.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(compressedContentsOfDirectoryAtURL url: URL)
```

## Parameters

- **url**: A file URL for a directory whose contents should be compressed.

## Discussion

Zips the contents of the provided directory and wraps the compressed output in an attachment with a [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/uniformTypeIdentifier] of `"public.zip-archive"`. The attachment’s [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/name] property is set to the name of the zipped directory followed by an extension of `".zip"`.

Available on macOS only.

## Creating Attachments from Files and Folders

- **init(contentsOfFileAtURL:)**: Creates an attachment from the contents of an existing file on disk.
- **init(contentsOfFileAtURL:uniformTypeIdentifier:)**: Creates an attachment from the contents of an existing file on disk, with a custom UTI.
